raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nokahpe Mohsus pee
m Laudun/ un faztija to us
neem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XX. Nodalla.
definits Deewa Bansli tohp us to Kalnu
inai ar bresmigu Balkni dohti: 1/8.
a wiſi Laudis pahr to iſtrubzinajahs: 19.
et Mohsus eepreezina tohs: 20. Deews
wehi wi,in Elka Decivibu pamest: 22/23.
paweht weenu Altari us Semmes ustai-
t to Dedsamo un Pateikſchanas. Uppuzu
1:24.
Ad runnaja Decws wit-
us schohs Wahrdus/
un faztija:
Es efmu tas KUNGS
s Deetws/ kas Es tew no E-
es-Semmes/ no ta Wahr-
ammu/ isweddis efmu.
Tew ne buhs zittus Dec-
turreht preekſch mannis.
Tew ne buhs feewim ne kah-
isgraisitu Tehlu/ nedg kahdu
ibnu darriht/ (no ta)/ kas
chan Debbesi irr/ nedg (no
kas apvakſcha wirs Semmes
nedg no ta/ kas Uhdeni ap-
ch tahs Semmes irr.
Tew ne buhs preekſch win-
n femunemstees/ nedg win-
n kalpoht/ jo es tas KUNGS
s Deews efmu weens
IPRAIS DEEWS/
ns * Dusmotajs/ peemekle-
as tohs Tehwu Noseegimus
teem Behrneeni lihds treschan
zettortam Augunam pee
n/ kas mann eenihst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Schehlastibu darridams
pee tuhkſtoscheem/ kas mann mih-
to/ un mannu Bauslus turr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tew ne buhs ta KUNGA
tawa Deewa Wahrdw welii wal-
kaht/ jo tas KUNGS to ne foḥ-
ditu ne pamettihs/ kas winna
Wahrdw welii walka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Peeminni tahs ſwehtas
Deenas/ ka tu to ſwehti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Gefchas Deenas buhs tew
ſtrahdaht/ un wiſſu tawu Dar-
bu darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ta ſeptita Deena irr
ta KUNGA tawa Deewa Duf-
fefchanas-Deena/ tew ne buhs ne
kahdu Darbu darriht/ nedg pa-
jcham/ nedg tawam Dehſam/
nedg tawai Meitai/ nedg tawam
Kalpam/ nedg tawai Kalponei/
nedg tawam Lohpam/ nedg ta-
wam Sweſchineekain/ kas ta-
wäs Wahrtis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ſefchas Deenäs irr
tas KUNGS to Debbesi/ un
1
to Semmi/ to Juhru/ un wiſſu/
kas eekſch tahs irr/ darrijs/ un
irr ſeptita Deena dusfejs/ tadeht
irr tas KUNGS to Dusſescha-
nas-Deenu ſwehtijs/ un irr to
eeſwehtijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Gohdi tawu Tehwu un
tawu Mahti/ ka tu ilgi * dſihwo
wirs tahs Semmes/ ko tew tas
KUNGS taws Deews dohd.
* Eebr: Wall ir taſkann: Ka tee, (prohti Tehws
un Mahte) tawu Dſihwibu pagarrina.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
